text: This port is for AI clients. Human players, please use the standard telnet port.

text:
mudletmap not recognized. Type help for commands.

.: [вҖў] Town Square [Frostfang]
In the shimmering heart of Frostfang, a city wrapped in a perpetual      в•”в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•—
blanket of snow and illuminated by the ethereal glow of the auroras,     в•‘  вҖў  в•‘
lies the Town Square. Your gaze is drawn to a prominent sign adorned     в•‘  в”Ӯ  в•‘
with a detailed map, providing an essential guide to the area's layout.  в•‘вҖўв”Җ@в”ҖвҖўв•‘
You find yourself amidst the hustle and bustle of the Square, where      в•‘  в”Ӯ  в•‘
icicle-laden stalls display wares from around the frozen realm, and      в•‘  вҖў  в•‘
citizens clad in thick furs exchange stories of their encounters with    в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қ
mystical creatures.
